metadata.description: A personal collection of Claude Code skills — ABP Framework backend/frontend guidance and Conventional Commits authoring.

plugins.name: abp-backend
plugins.description: ABP Framework backend guidance: DDD layering, application services, repositories, EF Core, modules, multi-tenancy, authorization, validation, and the abp CLI / Studio / Suite.

plugins.name: abp-frontend
plugins.description: ABP Framework UI guidance for MVC/Razor, Blazor (Server/WASM/WebApp/MAUI Blazor), Angular, React Native (Expo), and .NET MAUI — including LeptonX theming and service proxies.

plugins.name: writing-commit-messages
plugins.description: Author Conventional Commits 1.0.0 messages so CHANGELOG generation, SemVer bumps, and commitlint stay correct.

plugins.name: surveyjs
plugins.description: SurveyJS 2.5.20 guidance: Form Library (React/Angular), Survey Creator, schema/API authoring, custom properties and question types, and server-side validation under Microsoft.ClearScript V8 in .NET.
